untranslatable_reason: Signal references 'strike_price' and options-specific mechanics (put options, option prices, option contracts) which are not supported by the equity price/indicator-based backtesting engine. Strike price is a derivative instrument parameter not available in the allowed indicators list. The 10% profit target and stop loss logic assumes option pricing dynamics that cannot be accurately modeled using only spot price and technical indicators.
translation_notes: This is an options trading strategy (buying put options) with entry tied to spot price matching strike price and exit based on option profit/loss targets. The signal requires options chain data and strike price parameters that exceed the scope of standard equity technical analysis indicators. A functional implementation would require an options-capable backtesting engine with access to option Greeks, implied volatility, and time decay calculations.
